title: Add Next.js font optimization to apps/admin
description:
Improve admin app performance and consistency by using `next/font` for font loading instead of external CSS @import.

## What to do

1. Identify the font(s) in use in `apps/admin/src/app/globals.css`
2. Replace with `next/font/google` or `next/font/local` as appropriate
3. Apply font CSS variable to the root layout `className`
4. Remove any Google Fonts `@import` from CSS files

## Acceptance Criteria
- No external font requests in production build
- Font loads via next/font with proper CSS variable
- No layout shift
- Build passes TypeScript and lint checks
